title: Update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.59.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage) | `v1.58.1-0.20250711145627-2b18ddcfafca` -> `v1.59.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.59.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fstorage/v1.58.1-0.20250711145627-2b18ddcfafca/v1.59.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.59.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.59.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.58.0...v1.59.0)

#### What's Changed

- Bump c/storage to v1.58.0, then v1.59.0-dev by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2319](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2319)
- chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.1.2 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2316](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2316)6
- types: Always apply rootless path defaults by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2318](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2318)
- Improve error handling in archive creation by [@​hanwen-flow](https://redirect.github.com/hanwen-flow) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2289](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2289)
- chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation\_images to v20250422 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2321](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2321)1
- chunked: use temporary file for tar-split data by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2312](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2312)
- chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.1.5 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2322](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2322)2
- chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.1.6 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2324](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2324)4
- fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.14.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2326](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2326)6
- fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.33.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2327](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2327)7
- fix tarsplit file leak by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2323](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2323)
- fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.13.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2329](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2329)9
- Fix nits from [#​2312](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/issues/2312) by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2328](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2328)
- Fix `git-validation` on PRs behind `main` by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2342](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2342)
- fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.15.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2344](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2344)4
- overlay: drop unused fsMagic from support checks by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2341](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2341)
- Fix: Introduce `StagingLockfile` to resolve overlay staging lock memory leak by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2336](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2336)
- scope contiguity checks for idmap to mountProgram presence by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2346](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2346)
- Remove a deprecated configuration section by [@​mtrmac](https://redirect.github.com/mtrmac) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2339](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2339)
- chunked: allow conversion without zstd compression by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2343](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2343)
- docfix: storage.overlay.pull\_options should be storage.options.pull\_o… by [@​albinvass](https://redirect.github.com/albinvass) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2337](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2337)
- chore(deps): update dependency golangci/golangci-lint to v2.2.1 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2348](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2348)8
- fix(deps): update module github.com/tchap/go-patricia/v2 to v2.3.3 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2349](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2349)9
- Introduce a temporary directory for deleting layer files outside the lock by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2325](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2325)
- fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sync to v0.16.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2350](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2350)0
- fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.34.0 by [@​renovate](https://redirect.github.com/renovate)\[bot] in[https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2351](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2351)1

#### New Contributors

- [@​albinvass](https://redirect.github.com/albinvass) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/2337](https://redirect.github.com/containers/storage/pull/2337)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.58.0...v1.59.0

</details>
